product_overview: Saleor is a modern, full-stack e-commerce platform providing an enterprise-grade solution with a GraphQL API backend, admin dashboard, and customer-facing storefront. It enables businesses to manage products, orders, customers, and payments efficiently while delivering a responsive and scalable shopping experience.
core_goals: Enable complete e-commerce operations including product, order, and customer management.
Provide a seamless and responsive customer shopping experience across devices.
Ensure secure payment processing using Stripe integration.
Support multi-channel sales, multi-currency pricing, and internationalization.
Offer extensibility through apps, webhooks, and configurable settings.
key_features: User authentication with JWT and role-based access control.
Comprehensive product management with variants, attributes, inventory, and pricing.
Full order lifecycle management including fulfillment, invoicing, and refunds.
Customer account management with order history and address book.
Discount and promotion systems with gift cards support.
Sophisticated shipping, tax, channel, and warehouse management.
Admin dashboard with intuitive UI for managing products, orders, customers, staff, and configurations.
Customer storefront with product browsing, cart, checkout, and account features.
Stripe payment gateway integration with secure payment flow and webhook handling.
Support for additional apps including SMTP for emails and invoice generation.
GraphQL API backend supporting custom integrations and webhooks.
Robust testing strategy including unit, integration, and end-to-end tests.
user_flow_summary: Customer shopping flow from browsing, adding to cart, checkout, to order confirmation.
Admin product management flow including product creation, order management, and invoice generation.
Payment processing flow from payment submission to webhook confirmation and order update.
validation_criteria: All core functionalities operate as specified without critical defects.
Secure and reliable payment processing with accurate order status updates.
Admin and customer interfaces are responsive and user-friendly.
Performance benchmarks met including sub-3 second page loads and sub-500ms API responses.
Comprehensive test coverage for authentication, product and order management, payment, and checkout flows.
Proper enforcement of security best practices including authentication and data protection.
System scalability to support multi-channel and large catalogs while maintaining performance.

features.name: Authentication System
features.description: User authentication with JWT tokens, login, logout, password reset, and role-based access control

features.name: Product Management
features.description: Create, edit, delete products with variants, attributes, images, inventory management, and pricing

features.name: Order Management
features.description: Complete order lifecycle management including order creation, fulfillment, invoicing, refunds, and status tracking

features.name: Invoice Generation
features.description: Generate, view, download, and delete invoices for orders with auto-refresh functionality

features.name: Customer Management
features.description: Manage customer accounts, view customer details, order history, and customer impersonation

features.name: Discount System
features.description: Create and manage discount codes, automatic discounts, promotions, and gift cards

features.name: Shipping Management
features.description: Configure shipping zones, methods, rates, and shipping address management

features.name: Tax Configuration
features.description: Manage tax rates, tax classes, and tax configuration per channel

features.name: Channel Management
features.description: Manage multiple sales channels, channel settings, and channel-specific configurations

features.name: Warehouse Management
features.description: Manage warehouses, inventory tracking, and stock allocation

features.name: Staff Management
features.description: Manage staff members, permissions, and role-based access control

features.name: App Management
features.description: Install, configure, and manage Saleor apps including Stripe, SMTP, and custom apps

features.name: Configuration Settings
features.description: Store settings, site configuration, and global application settings

features.name: GraphQL Integration
features.description: GraphQL queries, mutations, and fragments for API communication

features.name: UI Components
features.description: Reusable React components including forms, tables, dialogs, buttons, and data grids

features.name: Custom Hooks
features.description: Reusable React hooks for data fetching, state management, and business logic

features.name: Utilities and Services
features.description: Helper functions, utilities, and service modules for common operations

features.name: Internationalization
features.description: Multi-language support with translation management and locale handling

features.name: Feature Flags
features.description: Feature flag system for enabling/disabling features dynamically

features.name: Search Functionality
features.description: Global search across products, orders, customers, and other entities

features.name: Storefront - Product Catalog
features.description: Customer-facing product browsing, categories, collections, and product detail pages

features.name: Storefront - Shopping Cart
features.description: Shopping cart functionality with item management, quantity updates, and promo code application

features.name: Storefront - Checkout
features.description: Single-page checkout flow with shipping address, payment processing, and order confirmation

features.name: Storefront - Customer Account
features.description: Customer login, registration, account management, and order history

features.name: Payment Processing - Stripe
features.description: Stripe payment gateway integration for secure payment processing

features.name: Email Notifications - SMTP
features.description: SMTP app for sending order confirmations, shipping updates, and email notifications

features.name: Invoice App
features.description: Invoice generation and management app for order invoicing

features.name: Saleor API Backend
features.description: Django/GraphQL backend API with product management, order processing, and customer management

features.name: Background Jobs - Celery
features.description: Asynchronous task processing for emails, notifications, and background operations
